textByHash.1448233370726887e6ca3ed4a9ab7daab73848a9: Can't talk. I need to prepare myself.
textByHash.1b7fb13fe6f1fc1a2b5cfaada59ba932443cec6f: Climb the wall when you're ready. I'll distract the guard when you do.
textByHash.4d5c41f345ceb3d882e2cc05288946a705f652d8: I guess this will be my last day of blood tithes, one way or another.
textByHash.5f3d527baebdb25c16f35093d27f7cc9d439d7b4: Do you have my money yet?
textByHash.8fd52cbf1d269208b5d4482656b52f94e150c2b4: I ain't getting on the wrong side of a vyrewatch for nothing. You'll have to pay me.
textByHash.a9d1ffc8d60b12fc0c81060e62eff9bd25c9d3aa: I'm starting to think I made a mistake coming here.
textByHash.ac2b52de1962050a33e7ca98fc6f040a78f852c5: Thanks. Climb the wall when you're ready. I'll distract the guard when you do.
textByHash.d679cc8207e4b1b8c43c3f6ba5ed101081b9b5b7: It can't be that hard can it?
textByHash.e35a0511a5308b200c87a9ee78e10b0bfa948f6b: I will survive the Theatre! Just like Serafina did!
textByHash.fc3785d0f7d581fb628be102c62e5c2377b9db3d: There's a guy in sector three who sells weapons. Top secret, the vampyres can't know about it. I want to buy a sword from him so I have a better chance in the Theatre.
